product_name: Disney Toddler Winnie the Pooh Hunny Pot Walker

bullets: Encourages early walking, balance and movement confidence
Drop balls into hunny pot to activate lights, sounds and counting play
Interactive features including spinning gears, peek-a-boo Piglet and bouncing Tigger
Supports cognitive development, dexterity and early numeracy skills
Part of the trusted Disney Toddler range – “Big fun for little ones”
content.keywords: baby walker toy, toddler push walker, winnie the pooh toy, activity walker, learning walker toy, toddler development toy, musical walker, baby activity toy
content.description: Take first steps with confidence and fun using the Disney Toddler Winnie the Pooh Hunny Pot Walker. Designed to support early standing and walking, this feature-packed walker encourages movement while building balance, coordination and confidence. Drop the 3 colourful balls into the hunny pot chute to activate light-up counting balloons, playful sounds and cause-and-effect learning. Little ones will love the interactive features, including spinning gears, peek-a-boo Piglet and bouncing Tigger that move as the walker rolls along. Designed to support cognitive development, dexterity and early numeracy, this engaging activity walker makes learning fun at every milestone. Part of the Disney Toddler range, it’s a trusted companion that brings big fun for little ones.

attributes.whats_in_box: Two legs, two pushers, three balls, and one main body
attributes.primary_color: A walking cart that helps with intellectual development;

compliance.choking_hazard: Yes - Small Parts; Warning label on product packaging.
